result.summary: Found 3 issues: one critical accessibility problem with truncated legal text, one major readability issue with undersized disclaimer text, and one minor visual spacing concern.

issues.description: Disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom is truncated and incomplete, cutting off essential legal information. The text appears to end abruptly mid-sentence ('apply. See Promotions page for full T&Cs' is barely visible), making it impossible for users to read full terms and conditions.
issues.suggestion: Expand the disclaimer section with sufficient vertical space, ensure complete text visibility, or provide a 'Read Full Terms' link. The legal text should be fully readable without truncation for compliance and accessibility.

issues.description: The disclaimer/fine print text has an extremely small font size with tight line-height, making it very difficult to read. The contrast may also be insufficient against the yellow background in some areas.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size of disclaimer text to at least 11-12px, improve line-height spacing, and ensure sufficient color contrast (minimum 4.5:1 ratio) between text and background for readability compliance.

issues.description: The spacing between the main promotional content and the bottom disclaimer section is minimal, creating a cramped appearance and potentially pushing important legal information out of natural viewing area.
issues.suggestion: Add more vertical padding/margin between the bonus offer section and the disclaimer footer to improve visual hierarchy and ensure all content has breathing room.
